zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：短线横盘偏弱
zh.content:
当前价格6.8256，接近日内低位且略低于20日均线6.8987，说明多头修复乏力。24小时波动仅0.03%，市场更像在低位整理，短线结构仍偏弱，尚未形成有效反转信号。

指标上，MACD为-0.00168且未见信号线配合，空头动能仍占优；RSI缺失，无法确认超买超卖，但从价格贴近区间下沿看，反弹力度不足，追涨风险较高。

支撑位先看6.80整数关口，若失守，下一支撑可关注6.75一带；上方阻力位在6.90附近，若放量站稳，才有机会进一步测试7.00心理位与20日均线压力。

操作上宜等待确认再介入。激进者可在6.80附近轻仓试多，止损放在6.75下方；稳健者建议等价格收复6.90并伴随成交放大后，再顺势跟进。

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is trading in a very narrow range around 6.8256, with only a 0.03% gain over the last 24 hours, which suggests a market in consolidation rather than a strong directional move. The session high and low are tightly clustered, reinforcing the view that volatility is muted for now. Price remains below the 20-day SMA at 6.89873, so the short-term trend still leans slightly bearish to neutral.

Momentum signals also point to caution. The MACD is marginally negative at -0.00168, which indicates that bullish momentum is still weak and sellers retain a modest edge. With RSI unavailable, there is less confirmation on whether AVAX is oversold or near a reversal zone, so traders should rely more on price structure and moving averages. Until price reclaims the SMA, rallies may face resistance from nearby overhead supply.

Immediate support appears near the intraday low at 6.8166, followed by a more important floor around 6.80, where buyers may try to defend the range. On the upside, initial resistance sits at 6.8279, then the 6.90 area near the SMA. A clean break above 6.90 would improve the short-term outlook and could open the door toward the next psychological resistance near 7.00.

For traders, this setup favors patience and confirmation. Aggressive buyers may look for a bounce from 6.80 to 6.82 with tight stops below support, while more conservative participants may wait for a decisive close above 6.90 before entering long positions. If 6.80 fails, downside pressure could accelerate, making trend-following shorts more attractive. Position sizing should remain modest until momentum improves.
